title: DPA updated: two new subprocessors added for ML model training
summary: Twilio updated its Data Processing Agreement to add two subprocessors: DataFlow Analytics GmbH (Germany) and Vertex AI Processing LLC (USA). Both are used for training ML models that power Twilio's Flex AI features. If your DPA with Twilio restricts subprocessor additions, you have 30 days to object before the change takes effect. Non-Flex customers are not affected as these subprocessors are scoped to Flex AI features only.
